text: The archives hold echoes of forgotten packs and broken vows.
Within these walls, kale digs for a story she prayed was just a myth.
She finds it not in a single book, but in scattered verses and faded maps,
a desperate pilgrimage to a place the clouds themselves conspire to hide,
a crumbling shrine in the highest peaks where the first dragons supposedly gifted a fragment of their own life to fight the creeping cold.
It is a needle in a mountain range and her only thread.
